title: agropyron panormitanum subsp. hispanicum
intro: Agropyron panormitanum subsp. hispanicum, also known as Spanish wheat-grass, is a subspecies of the Agropyron panormitanum plant, a type of grass native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Spanish wheat-grass include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, Spanish wheat-grass is often used as a tea or tincture, and it can also be dried and used as a powder or added to salves and creams for topical application.
